label.title: Tomcat Log Provider
label.description: Configure the JCR mount point that exposes Tomcat log files in the document manager.
label.mountPathHint: JCR path where the log files will be accessible (e.g. /sites/systemsite/files/tomcat-logs). Changing this value remounts the provider.
label.saveSuccess: Settings saved. The provider will remount at the new path.
label.saveError: An error occurred while saving the settings.
